summary: Iteration 54: Tested frosted glass guided onboarding overlay fixes. All three reported issues (X bounce back, dashboard flash, Skip permanent dismissal) are FIXED. Verified X button stays dismissed, overlay reappears after navigation, Skip doesn't permanently suppress overlay.

x_button_bounce_back.notes: Clicking X dismisses overlay. Waited 3 seconds - overlay did NOT bounce back. guidedDismissedRef.current is set to true, preventing re-render triggers from showing overlay again.

skip_button_temporary_dismissal.notes: Skip button dismisses overlay correctly. After navigating to Messages and back to Dashboard, overlay REAPPEARS as expected. The sessionStorage workaround has been removed - now uses useRef which resets on component re-mount.

overlay_reappears_on_return.notes: After dismissing with X or Skip, navigating to /messages and back to /dashboard causes overlay to reappear. This confirms useRef resets properly on component unmount/remount.

lets_go_navigation.notes: Let's Go button navigates to /messages (step 1 route). After returning to dashboard, overlay reappears for the next step.

dashboard_flash_prevention.notes: Dashboard wrapper has opacity:0 until dashboardReady state is true (line 386). dashboardReady is set via double requestAnimationFrame after loading=false (line 100-102). This ensures smooth reveal without flash.

light_mode_css.notes: Light mode CSS vars properly defined in index.css: --guided-overlay-bg: rgba(240,247,255,0.82), --guided-title: #0F172A, --guided-desc: #475569. Visual testing limited by rate limiting.

useEffect_dependency_fix.notes: useEffect dependency changed from [estate] to [estate?.id] (line 49). This prevents infinite re-fetching caused by new object references from setEstate.

critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: guidedDismissedRef (useRef) replaces sessionStorage for dismissal tracking - resets on re-mount as expected
GOOD: useEffect dependency [estate?.id] prevents infinite loop from new object references
GOOD: Double requestAnimationFrame (lines 100-101) ensures overlay renders before dashboard reveal
GOOD: Light mode CSS vars properly implemented for overlay theme-adaptation
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three overlay bugs fixed and verified: (1) X button no longer bounces back, (2) Skip no longer permanently dismisses for session, (3) Dashboard doesn't flash before overlay. Rate limiting is 10 req/min on auth - plan test flows to minimize logins. Light mode visual test limited by rate limiting but CSS implementation verified in code.

mocked_apis.note: None - all tested features use real APIs
